title: Cyclocodon truncatus
taxonomy: Cyclocodon truncatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyclocodon. The classification for Cyclocodon truncatus is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, and the class Liliopsida. This plant's classification is part of its broader taxonomy, which includes its order Commelinales, and its family Commelinaceae. Within this classification, Cyclocodon truncatus is a member of the species Cyclocodon truncatus.

It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation. intro: Cyclocodon truncatus, also known as the Truncate Cyclocodon, is a plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The health benefits of Cyclocodon truncatus include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
